story.text:
# ✨ Stake Position
**💰 → 🔓(transparent) → 🏛️ → 🗳️**
*custos · governance · V49*

Open a transparent governance stake at V49. The stake is the risk; the slash is the witness; the vote is what the lattice counts.

> Transparency is the discipline of governance. What you stake, the city sees.

*Keywords:* stake · governance · transparent · v49 · pattern-c
